paths.name: @aws-sdk/client-sesv2
paths.message: Direct SES imports are forbidden outside `src/lib/side-effects/handlers/`. Use `dispatch({ kind: 'email.send', ... })` from @/lib/side-effects/dispatcher. See RISK-MANAGEMENT.md.

paths.name: @aws-sdk/client-ses
paths.message: Direct SES imports are forbidden outside `src/lib/side-effects/handlers/`. Use `dispatch({ kind: 'email.send', ... })` from @/lib/side-effects/dispatcher. See RISK-MANAGEMENT.md.

paths.name: resend
paths.message: Resend was replaced by SES. Use `dispatch({ kind: 'email.send', ... })` from @/lib/side-effects/dispatcher.

no-restricted-syntax.message: Direct calendar event writes (`calendar.events.insert`) are forbidden outside `src/lib/side-effects/handlers/`. Use `dispatch({ kind: 'calendar.create_event' | 'calendar.create_hold', ... })` from @/lib/side-effects/dispatcher. See RISK-MANAGEMENT.md.

Direct calendar event writes (`calendar.events.delete`) are forbidden outside `src/lib/side-effects/handlers/`. Use `dispatch({ kind: 'calendar.delete_event', ... })` from @/lib/side-effects/dispatcher.

Direct calendar event writes (`calendar.events.update`) are forbidden outside `src/lib/side-effects/handlers/`. Use a dispatch({ kind: 'calendar.*', ... }) effect (add a new kind if none fits). See RISK-MANAGEMENT.md.

Direct calendar event writes (`calendar.events.patch`) are forbidden outside `src/lib/side-effects/handlers/`. Use a dispatch({ kind: 'calendar.*', ... }) effect (add a new kind if none fits). See RISK-MANAGEMENT.md.

Profile fields (phone/videoProvider/zoomLink/defaultDuration) must be written via `writeProfileField` from `@/lib/profile-fields` (Proposal 3, decided 2026-04-21 §2.5). Top-level writes are legacy; the canonical home is `preferences.explicit.*`.
